mdSummary:
# Skeleton

Pulsing placeholder block for loading states.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/skeleton

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Skeleton | Animation | `SkeletonAnimation` | `SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| Skeleton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Skeleton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCard | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| SkeletonCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCircle | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| SkeletonCircle | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCircle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonText | Lines | `int` | `3` |  |
| SkeletonText | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| SkeletonText | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonText | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
